Header.cvSubtitle: Summary of my skills and qualifications
Banner.Description: Engineering leader with {{years}}+ years of experience taking products from 0→1 and scaling them 1→100 across fintech, cybersecurity, and enterprise software. Skilled at driving product adoption, optimizing systems for scale, and building high-performing teams that deliver business impact.
AboutMe.Title: About
AboutMe.Paragraphs: Always driven by the desire to create something new, I find software engineering to be the canvas for my creativity. I simply love being involved in the end-to-end creation of products. Starting right from the idea to design to development and finally the actual manifestation of the end goal, it's always an engaging journey.

With a professional background spanning Morgan Stanley, AnalyticsVerse, and presently M2P, I've garnered invaluable experience in navigating the intricacies of both large-scale enterprise projects and new greenfield initiatives. My tenure has been characterized by assuming ownership of critical functionalities and seeing them through to successful fruition.
Adapting to diverse technological landscapes has been second nature, and the key skills I've learned along the way include:
Experience.Title: Experience
Experience.Subtitle: My professional journey and corporate roles

Experience.Jobs.Title: Engineering Manager
Description: Led 3 teams (20+ engineers) to deliver core features for Concentric AI’s flagship DSPM product.
Directly increased revenue by 10% by designing and launching User Behavior Analytics (UBA) feature, enhancing anomaly detection and security.
Increased team velocity by 25% through improved sprint planning, capacity management, and agile practices.
Spearheaded Gradle and Java upgrades across 20+ microservices and remediated 100+ vulnerabilities, improving maintainability, ensuring compliance, for achieving FedRAMP certification.
Partnered with product, sales, success, and QA teams to deliver seamless feature rollouts, accelerating adoption timelines.
Mentored 20+ engineers through regular check-ins, boosting retention and supporting career development.
Partnered with TopHire and SuccessPact to accelerate hiring for critical roles; launched an internship hiring program through campus drives at 2 colleges, building long-term talent pipelines.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Tech Lead Manager
Description: Led a 9-member team to deliver a Loan Origination System adopted by multiple banks and NBFCs.
Built a customizable form engine that cut client onboarding time by 60% and accelerated sales.
Designed multi-tenancy architecture, reducing infra costs and improving scalability across clients.
Migrated infra to Helm, Argo CD, and Kubernetes GitOps, cutting deployment time by 70% and boosting reliability.
Drove code quality via PR reviews, sprint planning, and design reviews while mentoring junior engineers.
Partnered with product to influence roadmap decisions, directly contributing to market success.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Founding Engineer
Description: Directly impacted prospect-to-customer conversion by designing and implementing features like customizable dashboards and an interactive demo mode, among others, enhancing user experience without integrations.
Reduced cloud infrastructure cost by 10x by optimizing various batch jobs and cloud components.
Took ownership on all aspects of the product, including UI Design, Frontend, Backend, Cloud Infrastructure.
Optimized the website for SEO, significantly improving page performance, boosting organic traffic and visibility.
Mentored interns and other employees, enabling vital contribution from them to the product.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Manager (Senior Software Engineer)
Description: Led the technical development of a reporting and visualization project, integrating Tableau Dashboards with proprietary software and improved system scalability and reduced costs by redesigning the architecture.
Received appreciation from Bjarne Stroustrup (Inventor of C++) for developing a SaaS app supporting an NGO’s vaccination drive.
Demonstrated strong problem-solving skills by providing quick POCs & solutions for ad-hoc business needs.
Mentored summer interns for three consecutive years.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Design Head
Description: Created Social Media posters for various campaigns.
Led a team of graphic designers, guided them in day-to-day work.

FeatureProjects.Title: My projects
FeatureProjects.Subtitle: A showcase of selected applications and systems
FeatureProjects.Label: Featured Project

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Dijkstra's Robot
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Developed a line-following robot employing Dijkstra's algorithm to find the shortest path in a grid maze. Utilised Depth First Search for maze exploration, enabling efficient pathfinding from source to destination in subsequent runs.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Virtual Piano
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: The project involves the creation of a device capable of projecting a piano interface onto any surface, enabling users to play piano virtually. Utilizing a simple torch for projection and a webcam for image processing, the system tracks user interactions with the projected piano keys, translating them into corresponding musical output. This innovative setup allows users to enjoy playing the piano on any flat surface with minimal hardware requirements.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Game Development
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Developed single and multiplayer 2D games including PacMan, Pokémon, Snake, Ping Pong, Tic Tac Toe in various programming languages.

OtherProjects.Title: More projects

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Clipper-Co
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: This software facilitates the seamless sharing of clipboards between multiple users and devices. This functionality streamlines the process of sharing text among various devices, enhancing user convenience and productivity.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Happyness
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: This app aims to provide users with a refreshing and uplifting experience by delivering positive news stories in a concise and engaging format. In a world often dominated by negative headlines, this app seeks to promote happiness, inspiration, and optimism by curating and presenting news items that evoke joy and hope.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Poetic Musings
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Crafted in Angular, mimics a music player interface for navigating and enjoying poetry, featuring responsive design tailored for all devices without relying on CSS libraries.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Digital Watermark
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: It employs a 2 part visual secret sharing scheme to split a binary watermark image into two shares: a master share extracted from the host image and an ownership share held by the owner and a copyright verifier. This scheme ensures that the watermark remains invisible and resistant to extraction, even after modifications to the host image, demonstrating its effectiveness for copyright protection.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: iMouse
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Aims to create a proof of concept prototype for controlling a laptop mouse using only head movements. This innovative project is designed to assist quadriplegia patients in operating laptops by utilizing head movement as an input method, thereby enhancing accessibility and independence.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Consistent Hashing
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: An interactive tool to visually comprehend how consistent hashing distributes data across nodes in distributed systems, aiding in understanding load balancing and node management. It serves as an educational resource by providing intuitive insights into the workings of consistent hashing algorithms for students and developers.

Achievements.Title: Achievements
Achievements.Subtitle: Recognition and honors earned along the way

Achievements.Items.Description: Secured first place in the Mumbai Hackathon, organized by ERPNext, by developing a shared clipboard app bridging desktop and mobile devices within a 24-hour timeframe.

Received the Young Innovators Award from the esteemed then Chief Minister of Maharashtra, Mr. Devendra Fadnavis, for pioneering a virtual piano device. This innovation utilized a simple torch and camera to project a playable piano onto any surface. The accolade was bestowed during the competition organized by ZEE and DNA.
Advanced to the quarterfinals of the renowned ABU Robocon, a prestigious robotics competition on a global scale. Represented VJTI at the national level, competing against 105 other colleges.
Achieved victory in Adomania, an inter-college advertisement making competition, by crafting a captivating short film celebrating the vibrant essence of Mumbai.
Emerged as the winner of the M.R. Pai Memorial Elocution Competition at the inter-school level.

Contact.Title: Get in touch!
Contact.Content: I would be happy to receive your message if you wish to discuss new opportunities or anything interesting in general. Please feel free to reach out to me, and I will reply as soon as I see your message.

WhatIDo.Title: What I Do
WhatIDo.Subtitle: End-to-end development for web, mobile, and cloud.

WhatIDo.Cards.Title: Enterprise SaaS & Web Platforms
WhatIDo.Cards.Desc: Architecting production-grade web applications with robust Java backends, Angular frontends, and event-driven microservices that scale across enterprise tenants without rewiring the core for every new business flow.
Bullets: Full-stack SaaS architecture with Angular & Spring Boot
Multi-tenant RBAC and organizational permission layers
Real-time data sync and schema-driven UI systems

WhatIDo.Cards.Title: Mobile App Development
WhatIDo.Cards.Desc: Building high-performance, cross-platform mobile applications using React Native, sharing typed backends with web counterparts to eliminate API drift and deliver a native user experience.
Bullets: Cross-platform mobile apps with React Native & TypeScript
Shared API contracts & state management with web platforms
Native integrations: Push notifications, biometric auth, camera
App Store & Google Play Store publishing and deployment pipelines

WhatIDo.Cards.Title: AI & LLM Integration
WhatIDo.Cards.Desc: Integrating large language models and ML pipelines into production systems with vector databases, cost-aware routing, streaming responses, and the guardrails needed to ship AI features without hallucination risk.
Bullets: Vector search pipelines with Milvus and Elasticsearch
Gen AI features with OpenAI, Gemini, and custom LLMs
KNN clustering, DB2, and semantic similarity engines
RAG architectures and prompt security boundaries

WhatIDo.Cards.Title: Cloud & Infrastructure
WhatIDo.Cards.Desc: Setting up and operating production-grade infrastructure on AWS with container orchestration, CI/CD pipelines, and full observability stacks for zero-downtime releases across multiple environments.
Bullets: AWS infrastructure — S3, EKS, EC2, Secrets Manager
Kubernetes orchestration with Helm and autoscaling
CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and ArgoCD
CloudWatch monitoring, alerting, and log analytics
